### Justification:
Please briefly explain the changes present in this pull request and why they are necessary. It may be helpful to begin with a description of the target problem, the importance/impact of the problem and a description of how these suggested changes will address, resolve or improve the problem.

### Subsequent changes:
Please describe any follow-up work that will be created by merging these changes. For example, uploading a new datafile to the ecodata package may require figures in the SOE reports to be re-rendered. There may not be any subsequent actions and this field may be removed if it is not applicable.

### Reviewer instructions:
Please detail the process reviewers will need to follow to properly test these changes. It is especially helpful to identify the exact code needed to conduct a local build/review/test and to specify any aspects of the testing that may not be obvious (e.g. installing a particular package version before testing).
